scene: A refreshed teen Byte at his desk in the morning light, content and ready for the day.

subjects.description: Byte, a gangly teen pixel art creature, posture relaxed and content, sitting at the desk. Exactly one food bowl with moderate kibble on the floor to the right of the desk, no overlap or intersection. Shelf above desk holds exactly one golden 10-day trophy on the left and exactly one healthy green plant friend on the right, clear spacing between all items.
Room environment with clean desk, oversized open laptop, and window showing Chicago skyline.

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: Bright morning light filtering through the window, gentle and warm
background: Room with desk, oversized laptop, shelf with one trophy and one plant, food bowl on floor, and window with Chicago skyline.
